narrative:
Saint Joseph Twp township has 1,850 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.4 percentage points.
